rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level conditions.
Place input envelope and output range contracts in component type scope only when using visible, non-subcomponent ports.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by aligning AGREE annex scope with the component's type or implementation context.
Only reference features or ports explicitly visible in the AADL model structure.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for all AGREE content.
Ensure expressions in guarantees and assumptions use only typed ports or constants declared in the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes.
Do not treat AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as accessible AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
